---
image: images/eiffel.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/matteo-glaizal-28a799345/
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/matteo24-24
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:[glaizal.matteo2@mail.dcu.ie]
---
Hi, I am Matteo Glaizal. I am a French business student at Montpellier Business School, currently completing an Erasmus exchange at DCU in Dublin. I am driven by curiosity, adaptability, and a strong commitment to excellence. Welcome to my ePortfolio, where I showcase my academic journey and data management projects
